commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And when the virgins were gathered together the second time, then Mordecai sat in the king's gate. Septuagint, "But Mardochai "(Haydock) They say nothing of the gifts, ver. The same process had been observed before, when Vasthi was chosen. (Calmet) Mardochai was perhaps then one of the king's guards. (Haydock) (Ver. ) (Tirinus) This second inquiry is here specified, to introduce the following account. (Menochius).
